name: 撒糖互撩型
description: 確認關係後的打情罵俏，用輕鬆幽默的對話展現情侶日常，滿足觀眾對「甜蜜戀愛」的幻想。語言上帶有輕微的性暗示但不過界。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Andy, you don't seem to be a good kisser. / I'm not as experienced as you are. / It's still not enough. I won't stop until you become a good kisser. / Andy, don't you know I always want to be your own pet.
